About

01 — Profile

I'm a Digital Communication and Marketing graduate (110/110 cum laude) with hands-on experience in institutional communication, social media strategy and editorial planning. At Confindustria Veneto Est I manage content across channels, coordinate high-profile projects and support events that bring together business leaders and institutional representatives.

Through internships across different sectors and a multicultural academic path between Italy and Spain, I've built solid interpersonal skills and a natural aptitude for teamwork and collaboration. I'm passionate about creating engaging digital content, and I'm looking for my next step within an international team, ideally abroad, where I can keep learning and contribute to meaningful projects.

I believe communication works best when strategy and sensibility move together — one gives it direction, the other gives it a voice.

— Ilenia
  • LocationVenice, Italy
  • EducationMA Web Marketing & Digital Comm., IUSVE (110/110 cum laude)
  • LanguagesItalian, English, Spanish, German
  • FocusSocial media strategy, editorial planning, institutional comms
  • ToolsMeta Business Suite, Canva Pro, Adobe CC, Brevo, Google Ads/Analytics
